# Fixture Type A : DC backend gele - id client sans reponse server matching
#
# Synthetique (fabriquee par Claude Code, pas extraite d'un log reel).
# Pattern minimal :
# - 3 requetes client (ids 100, 101, 102)
# - Server repond uniquement aux ids 100 et 101
# - L'id 102 reste sans reponse (DC backend gele apres avoir traite 101)
#
# Verdict attendu du classifier :
#   type = frozen_backend (Type A)
#   details.unanswered_client_ids = [102]
#   details.client_ids_count = 3
#   details.server_ids_count = 2

2026-05-06T10:00:00.100Z [Desktop Commander] [info] Message from client: {"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"read_file","arguments":{"path":"/Users/USER/foo.txt"}},"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":100} { metadata: undefined }
2026-05-06T10:00:00.150Z [Desktop Commander] [info] Message from server: {"result":{"content":[{"type":"text","text":"file content here"}]},"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":100} { metadata: undefined }
2026-05-06T10:00:01.100Z [Desktop Commander] [info] Message from client: {"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"read_file","arguments":{"path":"/Users/USER/bar.txt"}},"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":101} { metadata: undefined }
2026-05-06T10:00:01.180Z [Desktop Commander] [info] Message from server: {"result":{"content":[{"type":"text","text":"more content"}]},"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":101} { metadata: undefined }
2026-05-06T10:00:02.100Z [Desktop Commander] [info] Message from client: {"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"start_process","arguments":{"command":"sleep 1000"}},"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":102} { metadata: undefined }

# === DC BACKEND BLOQUE ICI ===
# Aucune reponse server pour l'id 102. Pas de log subsequent.
# C'est ce signal "id client sans reponse server" qui declenche Type A.
